reviews.review_description: This tutorial is very infuriating, because in this middle of the tutorial the game paused and made me fall.
The game is great no levels besides the tower fun mechanisms (the solar panels) it's like the climb 2
Impossible to get to the 4th part and it is a rage bait game i do not like it

The game is nice and cool, but there are some problems

1: The slope that appears sometimes in the start makes it hard to grab the climbing things

2: Grabbing hitbox is janky and its hard to grab


On the other hand I have suggestions

1: New setting to remove vignette when falling

2: New setting to remove air woosh when falling

I have some issues here the tutorial is difficult and I came and figure out how to do the solar panel part so you need to add a solar panel tutorial because it's really hard for me first of all and also the commando and newbie mode all at the same exact thing they are the some hard and soldiers really hard too

developer_response.body: Thank you for your insightful comments. We're aware our current tutorial isn't ideal, so we're creating a completely new one. Please check back with our next release. We plan more interesting things to come, besides the solar panel. The level only changes the number of floors, not their style.

reviews.review_description: This game was designed horribly, literally crap why the hell would you make moving parts if your gonna design them like actual crap, this game is trash. Game is impossible and has dozens of bugs and makes it your problem

developer_response.body:
Please accept my sincerest apologies for your unpleasant experience.
Could you be more specific about which game elements you're referring to? We would be grateful if you could send screenshots or videos to unity@saritasa.com.

reviews.review_description: Trackiing for the hands in this game is so bad, gripping is not working propperly, doesnt register correctly i have the hand in one possiyion and it grabs from the underside instead. So many times fell because the game lost tracking of the hands, and i have the lights turned on the roo., not like I'm  playing in complete darkness. Complete waste of time!

developer_response.body: We sincerely apologize for the difficulties you encountered during the experiment. Are you referring to hand tracking or controllers? The lights are unaffected because hand tracking is not supported. We tested the system extensively with multiple controllers and devices; however, it performed well each time. Have you tried your controllers with other games or applications? Low battery or damage may be the problem.

reviews.review_description:
Dear devs,


Great game…but the is one major issue, when throwing yourself from one object to another, you sometimes clip through the wall a little bit and you can’t grab things, I was wondering if you could fix this.
Other than that, this game is super fun and i TOTALLY recommend it for people of all ages and abilities, this game it a 10/10 recommendation from me.


                                                                    -user

developer_response.body: We really appreciate your feedback, and we're committed to resolving this issue as quickly as possible. If you could send a video to unity@saritasa.com, that would be immensely helpful. Thank you so much!

reviews.review_description:
It is a really fun climbing simulator and the mechanics are great, nice visual art, easy to play
One complaint: it's kind of hard to climb up the railing / safety bars when climbing to a checkpoint or platform, I fell a couple of times because I couldn't reach it even though I was above it
Otherwise, really fun game

developer_response.body:
Your kind review is much appreciated. 
Swing your arms down entirely to reach your legs when climbing the railing or safety bars, just like in real life where swinging your arms strongly and completely is needed to raise your entire body. By gently swinging to touch your chest or belly, your hips will be above the surface while your legs stay below the surface.
Our team plans to enhance your ideas for upcoming releases.

reviews.review_description: It fun to play but that is until you reach the issues. Sometimes it wouldn't let me grab something which I wouldn't notice till too late and sometimes it just forced me off

developer_response.body: I appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. Could you be more specific about which game elements you're referring to? We would be grateful if you could send screenshots or videos to unity@saritasa.com.

reviews.review_description: and seemed kinda awkward.

developer_response.body:
We apologize for the negative encounter you endured.
Would you provide further details regarding the problem?
A screenshot or video sent to unity@saritasa.com would be helpful.

reviews.review_title: Keep falling... At least its free
reviews.review_description:
As title... beginning difficulty... full immersive movement... 

Cannot *turn* when you are actively climbing, only when on the ground... whihc means i keep going beyond my passthrough... 

Also, on certain objects whihc *should be and are* climbable... are  not *grabable* please don't start charging for this until it is fixed ;) ... Nice attempt at a free version of The Climb though :)

developer_response.body:
Turning is disabled while climbing to maintain realism; your legs being off the ground restrict a full 360-degree turn. This intentional design choice aims to provide a more authentic experience, prompting you to physically turn your head instead.
Please let us know which objects are climbable but not grabbable. It would be useful for us if you could send a video or screenshot to unity@saritasa.com.

reviews.review_title: Great Game, 1.15 fixed all my problems
reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game and the developers actually take feedback from reviews, which is rare. I have nothing bad to say about this game, all I have is a suggestion: what if there are multiple game modes and/or locations. One could be in space, one could be in a volcano, etc. I think this would make the game both more immersive and customizable for different types of players, but overall this game is amazing.

developer_response.body: We value your feedback, thanks for taking the time to rate and review. Your idea is under consideration. We're hard at work on milestone 2.0, which will include some challenging new features like shooting while climbing, auto-bot enemies, and a stamina mechanic. We'll let you know when the update is ready!

reviews.review_description: Its a cool idea but i hate that when i fall a black screen stats to cover my screen and i cant turn it off

developer_response.body: I am sorry for your feelings. We aim for an all-ages game; therefore, we avoid realistic depictions of falling to prevent frightening younger players and ensure a comfortable experience.

reviews.review_description: Such a good Game it has so much to offer . And it’s free !!!

developer_response.body: Appreciate the feedback! Stay tuned for more challenges.

reviews.review_description: Warning! it can make you feel nauseous when you fall, but otherwise very fun!

developer_response.body: Your words are greatly appreciated.

reviews.review_description:
I don’t know what to say so maybe I’ll give a reason why I gave 2 star (admin please read it it’s important):

1. Everything looks cool. The background, you etc.
2. Hard to grab anything (so when you are in the end of the tutorial. It’s already hard to beat it (I’ve skipped it)).
3. When you fall most blackens out and you barely see anything.
4. When you are going and it asks you to restart a game the notification is right in front of your nose. It’s hard to read.
5. The things that you are holding are sometimes upside down (so when for e.g. you grab a pipe your hand is holding from bottom not top).

developer_response.body:
Your helpful and informative feedback is greatly appreciated.
Regarding number 2, we will remake the tutorial after exciting new features such as shooting while climbing, auto-bots, and stamina. Please wait for version 2.0.
Regarding feedback number 3, we aim for an all-ages game; therefore, we're avoiding realistic depictions of falling to prevent frightening younger players and ensure a comfortable experience.
We will resolve issue number 4.
I'm not sure which parts of game number 5 you're referring to. We'd appreciate screenshots or videos sent to unity@saritasa.com.

reviews.review_description:
The problem is that it’s not bad at all it’s the best game I have experienced and my family appreciates the game so 
Much! I wish I could rate it more bye!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for acknowledging and expressing your gratitude. Would you kindly let us know what the problem is?
We've just released version 1.1.5, could you please see if your issue is still there?

reviews.review_description: Very glitchy

developer_response.body:
I sincerely regret the negative experience you have encountered.
I am uncertain which elements of the game you are referring to. We'd appreciate screenshots or videos sent to unity@saritasa.com.

reviews.review_description: This game sucks it's impossible to beat and the graphic are kinda bad who ever  made this i know where you live  rateing  is 0/5

developer_response.body: Could you try updating to version 1.1.5 and see if that resolves the issue? If not, can you tell us what the impossible thing to overcome is?

reviews.review_description: Hard but fun play if you like hard climbing games

developer_response.body: Thank you

reviews.review_description:
This game has a lot of promise in its early stages.

PROS:
- clean, sharp graphics and nice design aesthetics
- the one song that loops over and over is pretty good
- fairly decent mechanics
- fun, simple climbing game

CONS: 
- the down-climbing part of the tutorial can't be completed. Every time I reach the bottom and try to leap to the next info placard, I start up top again. What am I missing?
- leaping/pushing off of buildings should result in more lateral travel in that direction
- there is currently only one level at this point
- only certain grip holds induce haptic fatigue

Overall, I really like this, and hope to see a lot more added in the future!

l i n k t r . e e / q u a c k b i r t h

developer_response.body:
We value your feedback and take it seriously. Would you mind taking another look at it, using version 1.1.5 this time?
The tutorial's down-climbing section is now easier, and leaping or pushing off buildings now includes inertia. Haptic feedback has also been improved.

reviews.review_description: It's really good for a free quest game. It's challenging but mostly fair. Of course needs some polish but I enjoy it.

developer_response.body: I appreciate your compliment. We are working on making it a greater challenge.

reviews.review_description: If you can’t afford games like the climb just get this even though it is free it is still good

developer_response.body: Your kind words and high rating are much appreciated.

reviews.review_description: When I get to the top I can't pull myself up

developer_response.body: I appreciate the feedback you gave. Please move your hands down and release the grab button simultaneously, as you would in the real world. Since your legs are in the air, you will need to use the strength of your hands to pull your entire body up. Could you take a look at this again using version 1.1.5, the newest update?

reviews.review_description: While I was playing there was a jump that was impossible for me to make because it was on a slanted surface and the legs got in the way.

developer_response.body: Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us. Would you mind checking it again on the latest version, 1.1.5?

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun. I had so much fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback

reviews.review_description: Its So good the climbing is of course the Best part of the Game the gameplay is also really good So try it out.

developer_response.body: I am grateful for your recognition.

reviews.review_description:
The game is fun but my STUPID AGH STICK DRIFT COMES IN AND RUINS OF THE GAMEPLAY
I found a solution tho so
I switch thumb sticks and guess what?
IT IMPACTED MY GAME
So I politely ask you to make a option to disable snap turn 😐

developer_response.body: The latest version, 1.1.5, has been released. While playing, press the Menu button on the left controller to access options for adjusting your walking speed and head turn settings.

reviews.review_title: Great game but I have an idea
reviews.review_description: This is a super fun game but you should add a stamina to your hands. That would add a lot of difficulty and make it fun

developer_response.body: Thank you for your idea. We will add this feature to a new version.
